Title: Parcel warns about redundant Babel config on app start
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Run npm run dev:frontend from repo root; 2) Observe startup logs; 3) Warning references frontend/.babelrc and @babel/preset-env
Root Cause: Parcel already performs transpilation and the custom Babel presets were redundant for this setup
Fix Implemented: Removed frontend/.babelrc to rely on Parcel default transpilation target handling
Verification: Restarted frontend dev server; startup completes and warning is no longer emitted

Title: Missing async/await on findCurrentUser — returns Promise instead of user
Steps to Reproduce: 1) PUT /api/one-time-entries/:id with valid token; 2) Handler gets a Promise not the user object; 3) user.email fails
Root Cause: findCurrentUser is async but handler was sync and did not await the call
Fix Implemented: Added async to handler, await on findCurrentUser and service calls
Verification: Tests pass with correct user resolution

Title: Missing async/await on findCurrentUser — returns Promise instead of user
Root Cause: Same root cause — sync handler calling async function
Fix Implemented: Added async to handler, await on findCurrentUser and service calls

Title: getFreshToken extracts token from res.body.token instead of res.body.data.token
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Run account tests; 2) Token is undefined; 3) All authenticated requests fail with 401
Root Cause: API wraps responses in { success: true; data: {...} } but test reads top-level .token
Fix Implemented: Changed res.body.token to res.body.data.token in getFreshToken helper

Title: registerAndLogin extracts token from loginResponse.body.token instead of loginResponse.body.data.token
Fix Implemented: Changed to loginResponse.body.data.token

Title: Hardcoded email session@example.com causes 409 Conflict on repeat runs
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Run tests twice without DB reset; 2) Second run gets 409 on registration
Root Cause: Hardcoded email persists in DB across test runs
Fix Implemented: Generated unique email per test run

Title: JWT_SECRET falls back to hardcoded dev_secret — production risk
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Deploy without JWT_SECRET env var; 2) All tokens signed with guessable secret
Fix Implemented: Added runtime check: throw if JWT_SECRET missing in production, use dev_secret only in dev/test

Title: JWT verification falls back to hardcoded dev_secret — same production risk
Fix Implemented: Applied same JWT_SECRET guard pattern

Title: normalizeEmail imported from legacy in-memory data/userStore.js instead of db/userStore.js
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Inspect imports; 2) authService imports from data/userStore while persistence uses db/userStore
Root Cause: Leftover from pre-DB migration — dual user store confusion
Fix Implemented: Moved normalizeEmail to db/userStore.js and updated imports

Title: OneTimeEntry model missing createdAt/updatedAt — code writes them causing Prisma validation errors
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Create a one-time entry; 2) Prisma rejects unknown field createdAt
Root Cause: Schema lacked timestamp columns that application code references
Fix Implemented: Added createdAt DateTime @default(now()) and updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt to OneTimeEntry model

Title: No onDelete cascade on foreign key relations — orphaned records on profile deletion
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Delete a FinancialProfile; 2) Related OneTimeEntry/RecurringPayment rows remain orphaned
Fix Implemented: Added onDelete: Cascade to all child relation fields

Title: Duplicate RECURRING_PAYMENTS deprecation constant (top and bottom of file)
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Read register.js; 2) RECURRING_PAYMENTS_DEPRECATION_MESSAGE at line 27 and RECURRING_PAYMENTS_DEPRECATION at line 249
Fix Implemented: Removed top-level RECURRING_PAYMENTS_DEPRECATION_MESSAGE and consolidated to single constant at bottom

Title: Account.js reads data.fullname instead of data.data.fullname for wrapped API response
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Load account page; 2) Profile fields show blank because data is nested under .data
Root Cause: API returns { success: true; data: { fullname; email } } but frontend reads top level
Fix Implemented: Updated to extract from data.data when present
